Our mission is to unlock the potential of Generative AI by tapping into real-world expertise from across the globe. About The Role This is a freelance role for a Tendem project. As a Full-Stack Web App Developer, you'll design, build, and refine browser-based applications with real logic, state, persistence, and user input — from habit trackers and budgeting tools to internal dashboards, mini-SaaS tools, and AI-powered apps. You may also work on standalone Python applications and data-processing scripts that sit alongside or behind these products. Key Responsibilities Build interactive web applications with frontend (React, Next.js, Vue, or similar) and a backend API (Python/FastAPI/Flask or Node/Express) Design and implement data models, schemas, and persistence layers using SQL (PostgreSQL, SQLite) or NoSQL stores Implement authentication, sessions, and basic role-based access where needed Integrate third-party APIs and AI/LLM services

empleos.titulo: Software Engineer Full Stack & AI First
empleos.descripcion: En Homie estamos transformando la forma en que las personas rentan vivienda en LATAM. No somos un portal de anuncios: administramos la renta de principio a fin en representación de los propietarios desde la captación y las visitas hasta el contrato, la gestión de la renta y la dispersión a los dueños. Después de casi diez años operando, estamos modernizando y reconstruyendo el núcleo de nuestra tecnología sobre bases AI-first: sistemas simples, bien probados y altamente apalancados en IA, capaces de operar todo el ciclo de renta con velocidad y calidad. Buscamos a alguien que construya con criterio: que use la IA como multiplicador real no como autocompletado, que sepa exactamente qué no construir y que se obsesione con la simplicidad, la calidad y los datos limpios. Si te emociona resolver problemas de negocio reales con apalancamiento de IA y tener impacto directo en un producto que mueve el mercado, queremos conocerte. Misión del rol Diseñar y construir con alto apalancamiento de IA, un núcleo de software simple, robusto y bien probado que habilite una mejor experiencia para propietarios, inquilinos y equipos internos, y que pueda evolucionar rápido sin acumular complejidad ni deuda. Tu trabajo no es solo escribir código: es construir los sistemas, las barreras de calidad y la observabilidad que permiten al equipo y a la IA entregar rápido y con confianza. Elevas el estándar técnico, mantienes los datos como activo central del negocio y aseguras que todo lo que sale a producción esté probado, sea reproducible y aporte valor real. Tareas Construir de punta a punta (full-stack), diseñas e implementas funcionalidades completas del ciclo de renta de la base de datos a la interfaz, con ownership end-to-end y comodidad para moverte por todo el stack. empleos.descripcion: We are looking for proactive and hands-on Full Stack Developers to join our team! You will be involved in a variety of tasks using modern technologies across the backend and frontend. The project is for an American multinational company that specializes in the sale of health, personal care, and other products, with a presence in countries ranging from the USA and Canada to several Asian markets, including Japan and South Korea. Job Activities • Develop, maintain, and enhance full stack applications, delivering complete features from technical design to deployment. • Build and evolve backend systems using Java (Spring Boot) or Python. • Develop and maintain modern frontend applications using React or similar frontend frameworks. • Troubleshoot bugs, investigate issues, and deliver fixes efficiently and reliably. • Fully understand business and technical requirements, proactively questioning what is unclear. • Translate business requirements into technical solutions and implementation plans. • Design and implement REST or GraphQL APIs, integrating multiple data sources. • Ensure high-quality deliveries by proactively testing, validating, and refactoring code. • Participate in the full software development lifecycle, including design, development, testing, deployment, and maintenance. • Monitor application performance and contribute to production support and continuous improvement. • Collaborate closely with team members, contributing to task planning, estimation, and prioritization. • Communicate effectively with clients, actively participating in meetings and technical discussions. • Identify risks, competing priorities, or delivery issues early and escalate appropriately. • Contribute to improving development processes, architecture, and team practices. • Support other

empleos.descripcion: Company Description Talan – Positive Innovation Talan is an international consulting group specializing in innovation and business transformation through technology. With over 7,200 consultants in 21 countries and a turnover of €850M, we are committed to delivering impactful, future-ready solutions. Talan at a Glance Headquartered in Paris and operating globally, Talan combines technology, innovation, and empowerment to deliver measurable results for our clients. Over the past 22 years, we’ve built a strong presence in the IT and consulting landscape, and we’re on track to reach €1 billion in revenue this year. Our Core Areas of Expertise Data & Technologies: We design and implement large-scale, end-to-end architecture and data solutions, including data integration, data science, visualization, Big Data, AI, and Generative AI. Cloud & Application Services: We integrate leading platforms such as SAP, Salesforce, Oracle, Microsoft, AWS, and IBM Maximo, helping clients transition to the cloud and improve operational efficiency. Management & Innovation Consulting: We lead business and digital transformation initiatives through project and change management best practices (PM, PMO, Agile, Scrum, Product Ownership), and support domains such as Supply Chain, Cybersecurity, and ESG/Low-Carbon strategies. We work with major global clients across diverse sectors, including Transport & Logistics, Financial Services, Energy & Utilities, Retail, and Media & Telecommunications. empleos.descripcion: We are currently hiring for a full-time remote position open exclusively to candidates based in the United States. This is a stable work-from-home opportunity within a professional, structured, and supportive team environment. Must have access to a reliable computer or laptop. Must have a stable and reliable internet connection. Basic computer skills are required, including typing, email usage, and file management. Strong attention to detail and accuracy. Good written and verbal communication skills. Ability to work independently with minimal supervision. Must have a quiet and distraction-free workspace. Key Responsibilities Perform assigned tasks accurately and efficiently on a daily basis. Enter, manage, and maintain data, records, or communications as required. Follow written instructions, company guidelines, and internal procedures carefully. Communicate professionally with internal teams or external contacts when necessary. Manage time effectively while working independently in a remote environment. Maintain confidentiality, data security, and data integrity at all times. Participate in training sessions, onboarding activities, or team meetings as required. Adapt to new tools, software, and processes as the role evolves. What We Offer Competitive pay at $28 per hour for full-time work. 100 percent remote work environment. Paid training and onboarding provided. Consistent full-time work schedule. Opportunities for growth and advancement

Job Title: Frontend Software Engineer Job Type: Contractor Location: Remote Job Summary Frontend Software Engineers to participate in a high-impact customer project, focusing on crafting exceptional user interfaces. In this role, you'll apply your expertise to help train next-generation AI systems. Your work will shape how models learn, reason, and perform through high-quality, real-world input. No prior experience in AI is required — your domain knowledge is what matters. Leverage your ability to interpret detailed component style guides and screenshots, delivering pixel-accurate, responsive web interfaces that set new standards in usability and aesthetics. Strong communication skills are highly valued for effective collaboration and documentation. Scope of Work Interpret and translate component style guides and interface screenshots into precise, visually consistent UI deliverables. Implement pixel-perfect, responsive web components using modern technologies such as Typescript and CSS3. Ensure all UI elements adhere to established design systems and accessibility standards. Collaborate asynchronously through clear documentation and constructive feedback within a remote-first environment. Proactively identify, communicate, and resolve inconsistencies or ambiguities in design specifications. Optimize UI performance across devices, focusing on fast load times and smooth interactions. Contribute domain-specific expertise to guide the training and development of advanced AI models. Preferred Qualifications Minimum of 3 years of professional experience delivering high-quality front-end solutions. Proven proficiency with Typescript, CSS3, and responsive web design principles. Building the Future of Open Finance Payward - the parent company behind Kraken, NinjaTrader, Breakout, xStocks, Payward Services and CF Benchmarks - has spent the last 15 years building one of the most modern and globally accessible financial infrastructure platforms in the industry, built to advance an open, global financial system. Before you apply, we encourage you to explore our culture page to understand what drives us and how we work. The Team We are currently seeking an experienced Senior Software Engineer to join our growing Payments & Blockchain team to be focused on our payments systems. The Payments & Blockchain team is responsible for the first and last mile of every dollar (digital or fiat) that goes in or out of Kraken. Join our Payments team to help integrate Kraken’s systems with an ever-expanding universe of payment providers. As a member of this team, your focus is on protecting client funds. You will be responsible for building systems that communicate with various blockchains to enable the timely processing of client transactions, while also ensuring the safety and security of all funds on the exchange. The Opportunity Design, develop, and maintain high-quality payment processing systems using React.js and other relevant technologies Build and refine seamless transaction experiences that optimize fund transfers for speed, security, and reliability Ensure an efficient and intuitive onboarding experience for users interacting with payment systems, reducing friction and improving trust Develop innovative features that enhance engagement, retention, and loyalty within the payments ecosystem Set the standard for high-quality, secure code and lead the development of complex financial software systems Influence technical decisions, contribute to strategy di

The salary range for this role is $2,800 - $6,000 per month (Gross in USD) About Sezzle: With a mission to financially empower the next generation, Sezzle is revolutionizing the shopping experience beyond payments, blending cutting-edge tech with seamless, interest-free installment plans that make shopping smarter and more accessible. We’re not just transforming payments; we’re redefining how people discover, interact with, and purchase the things they love while driving real impact on merchant sales through increased conversions and higher order values. As we continue to shape the future of fintech and retail, we’re building an innovative, dynamic team passionate about creating more than just a transaction but a truly unique shopping journey. If you’re excited about pushing boundaries in tech and delivering a game-changing experience for consumers and merchants alike, come join us at Sezzle and help create the future of shopping! Compensation: For this mid-level development role, with 3-7 years of experience, the compensation range is $2,800 - $6,000 USD per month. This range is designed to reflect the skills, experience, and value brought to the team, ensuring competitive and fair pay within the industry. Interview Process We believe transparency is important at Sezzle. Regularly providing feedback while setting expectations is part of our culture starting with the interview process. Advancement through each step is not guaranteed.
